meaning: n.金牛座,(占星术中)金牛宫
examples: Ford will soon introduce an update of its Taurus sedan, as well as some new small cars.
In June, Venus, your guardian planet, will be in Taurus, making you completely irresistible.
Taurus likes to plan life but Libra will make no such commitment and this can lead to some violent abuse on both sides.
Located at the foot of the rocky Taurus Mountains, the tree-house villages are a modern beach idyll.
The redesigned Mustang and Taurus each won their respective segments in their first year out of the box.
